name: vinuni_programs_per_college
description: Per-college undergraduate program facts (duration + credits for the single major/degree WITHOUT a minor). Verified 2026-06-24 from the v2-indexed authoritative curriculum PDFs / program-specification docs (policy.vinuni) and college pages, NOT bot output: CS=4yr/120 (BSCS, consistent across cohorts), MD=6yr/228 (MD_Program-Specifications + Cohort-2025), Nursing=4yr/126 current AY25-26 (146 w/ minor), BBA=4yr/120. CAS omitted — no CAS program/credit content surfaced in v2 (coverage gap; see LOGS/PHASE1.29_PLAN.md). SCORED set = cases that pass on v2+D9; the VI MD/Nursing variants moved to golden_targets/programs_xlingual.json (cross-lingual under-retrieval, awaiting the retrieval fix).

cases.question: How long is VinUni's Bachelor of Science in Computer Science program and how many credits for the single major?

How many years is VinUni's Doctor of Medicine (MD) program and how many total credits?
How many total credits does VinUni's current Bachelor of Nursing program require for the single degree, without a minor?
How many credits does VinUni's Bachelor of Business Administration require for the single major, without a minor?
Chương trình Bác sĩ Y khoa (MD) của VinUni kéo dài mấy năm và tổng cộng bao nhiêu tín chỉ?
